mapper.select: SELECT FROM cancellation_record WHERE application_id=#{id} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE cancellation_record SET cancel_reason_code=#{v.cancelReasonCode},cancel_reason_detail=#{v.cancelReasonDetail},event_date=#{v.eventDate},new_head_person_id=#{v.newHeadPersonId},version=version+1,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE application_id=#{v.applicationId} AND business_status='DRAFT' AND version=#{version}

UPDATE cancellation_record SET business_status=#{to},operator_id=COALESCE(#{operatorId},operator_id),executed_at=CASE WHEN #{to}='COMPLETED' THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE executed_at END,version=version+1,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE application_id=#{applicationId} AND business_status=#{from} AND version=#{version}

UPDATE cancellation_record SET person_name_snapshot=#{target.personName},identity_no_snapshot=#{target.identityNo},household_no_snapshot=#{target.householdNo},address_snapshot=#{target.address},region_code_snapshot=#{target.regionCode} WHERE application_id=#{applicationId} AND business_status='APPROVED'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cancellation_record WHERE person_id=#{personId} AND business_status IN('DRAFT','UNDER_REVIEW','APPROVED') AND application_id!=#{excludeApplicationId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cancellation_record WHERE household_id=#{householdId} AND business_status IN('DRAFT','UNDER_REVIEW','APPROVED') AND application_id!=#{excludeApplicationId}
mapper.sql: SELECT p.person_id,p.name person_name,p.id_card identity_no,p.status person_status,p.current_status_code,r.household_id,h.household_no,h.head_person_id,h.address,h.region_code,h.status household_status,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM household_member m WHERE m.household_id=h.household_id AND m.status='ACTIVE') active_member_count,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM residence rr WHERE rr.person_id=p.person_id) residence_count FROM person p LEFT JOIN residence r ON r.person_id=p.person_id LEFT JOIN household h ON h.household_id=r.household_id WHERE p.person_id=#{id}

SELECT h.household_id,h.household_no,h.head_person_id,h.address,h.region_code,h.household_type,h.establish_date,h.status household_status,p.name head_person_name,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM household_member m WHERE m.household_id=h.household_id AND m.status='ACTIVE') active_member_count,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM residence r WHERE r.household_id=h.household_id) residence_count FROM household h LEFT JOIN person p ON p.person_id=h.head_person_id WHERE h.household_id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT residence_id,person_id,household_id,registered_address,region_code,register_type_code,register_date,start_date,status,version FROM residence WHERE person_id=#{personId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM residence WHERE residence_id=#{id} AND version=#{version}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO residence_archive(original_registration_id,person_id,household_id,application_id,migration_out_id,archive_type,archive_reason,person_name_snapshot,identity_no_snapshot,household_no_snapshot,registered_address_snapshot,region_code_snapshot,register_type_code_snapshot,register_date_snapshot,start_date_snapshot,end_date_snapshot,original_status,archived_by,archived_at) SELECT #{residence.residenceId},#{record.personId},#{record.sourceHouseholdId},#{record.applicationId},NULL,#{archiveType},#{record.cancelReasonDetail},p.name,p.id_card,h.household_no,#{residence.registeredAddress},#{residence.regionCode},#{residence.registerTypeCode},#{residence.registerDate},#{residence.startDate},#{record.eventDate},#{residence.status},#{operatorId},CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM person p JOIN household h ON h.household_id=#{record.sourceHouseholdId} WHERE p.person_id=#{record.personId}
mapper.select: SELECT archive_id archiveId,original_registration_id originalRegistrationId,person_id personId,household_id householdId,application_id applicationId,migration_out_id migrationOutId,archive_type archiveType,archive_reason archiveReason,person_name_snapshot personNameSnapshot,identity_no_snapshot identityNoSnapshot,household_no_snapshot householdNoSnapshot,registered_address_snapshot registeredAddressSnapshot,region_code_snapshot regionCodeSnapshot,register_type_code_snapshot registerTypeCodeSnapshot,register_date_snapshot registerDateSnapshot,start_date_snapshot startDateSnapshot,end_date_snapshot endDateSnapshot,original_status originalStatus,archived_by archivedBy,archived_at archivedAt,created_at createdAt FROM residence_archive WHERE application_id=#{applicationId}
SELECT person_id FROM household_member WHERE household_id=#{householdId} AND status='ACTIVE' ORDER BY member_id
mapper.update: UPDATE household_member SET status='CANCELLED',leave_date=#{eventDate},version=version+1,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE household_id=#{householdId} AND person_id=#{personId} AND status='ACTIVE'
UPDATE household SET head_person_id=#{newHead},version=version+1,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE household_id=#{householdId} AND head_person_id=#{oldHead}
UPDATE household SET status='PENDING_CANCELLATION',head_person_id=NULL,version=version+1,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE household_id=#{householdId} AND head_person_id=#{oldHead}
UPDATE person SET current_status_code=#{status},current_address=NULL,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE person_id=#{personId} AND current_status_code NOT IN('CANCELLED','DECEASED')
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM migration_in WHERE to_household_id=#{householdId} AND business_status IN('DRAFT','UNDER_REVIEW','APPROVED')
mapper.update: UPDATE household SET status='CANCELLED',version=version+1,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE household_id=#{householdId} AND status='PENDING_CANCELLATION'
mapper.select: SELECT FROM cancellation_record ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT FROM household_archive ORDER BY archived_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
